title: M365 Copilot Eval Document
description: Schema for evaluation documents used by M365 Copilot Agent Evals CLI. Supports single-turn and multi-turn evaluations.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for editor validation support

schemaVersion.description: SemVer string identifying the schema version this document conforms to (e.g., '1.4.0')

items.description: Array of evaluation items: single-turn evaluations or multi-turn threads

DocumentMetadata.description: Optional metadata about the evaluation document

name.description: Human-readable name for the evaluation set

description.description: Description of what this evaluation set tests

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created

createdBy.description: Author or system that created the document

evaluatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when evaluation was performed

agentId.description: M365 Agent ID this evaluation targets

agentName.description: Name of the M365 agent this evaluation targets

cliVersion.description: Version of the M365 Copilot Agent Evals CLI that produced this document

extensions.description: Extension point for custom metadata. Use reverse-domain notation for field names.

expected_response.description: Expected or ideal response for comparison during evaluation

evaluators_mode.description: How per-prompt evaluators combine with defaults

error.description: Error details for this item, if any.

extensions.description: Extension point for custom item-level fields

MultiTurnThread.description: A multi-turn conversation thread with ordered turns sharing conversation context

description.description: Description of what this thread tests

conversation_id.description: Unique identifier for this conversation thread

extensions.description: Extension point for custom thread-level fields

Turn.description: A single turn within a multi-turn thread

prompt.description: The user message for this turn

expected_response.description: Expected agent response for this turn

evaluators_mode.description: How per-turn evaluators combine with defaults

error.description: Error details for this turn, if any.

extensions.description: Extension point for custom turn-level fields

Diagnostics.description: Extensible container for output diagnostics, keyed by diagnostic category and positioned alongside scores.

retrieval_executions.description: Sanitized retrieval activity - what the retrieval system actually returned.

totalResultCount.description: Total results reported by the capability execution

ScoreCollection.description: Collection of evaluation scores for an item. Each entry is either a valid result (ValidScore variants) or an errored record (ErroredScore) under the discriminated oneOf.

citations.description: Citation evaluation result or errored entry

exactMatch.description: Exact match evaluation result or errored entry

partialMatch.description: Partial match evaluation result or errored entry

retrievalQuery.description: RetrievalQuery evaluation result or errored entry

retrievalResult.description: RetrievalResult evaluation result or errored entry

EvalScore.description: Standard evaluation score (1-5 scale) — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

EvalScoreValid.description: Valid 1-5 score result. Required when result is pass or fail.

result.description: Pass/fail result based on threshold comparison

reason.description: Explanation of why this score was assigned

CitationScore.description: Citation-specific evaluation result — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

CitationScoreValid.description: Valid citation-count result. Required when result is pass or fail.

count.description: Number of citations found in the response

result.description: Pass/fail result based on citation count vs threshold

threshold.description: Minimum required number of citations for pass

ExactMatchScore.description: Exact match evaluation result — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

ExactMatchScoreValid.description: Valid exact-match result. Required when result is pass or fail.

match.description: Whether response exactly matches expected_response (trimmed; case-insensitive by default)

result.description: Pass when match is true, fail otherwise

PartialMatchScore.description: Partial match evaluation result — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

PartialMatchScoreValid.description: Valid partial-match result (0.0-1.0 score). Required when result is pass or fail.

score.description: Match score from 0.0 (no match) to 1.0 (full match)

result.description: Pass/fail based on score vs threshold

RetrievalQueryScore.description: RetrievalQuery evaluator result — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

RetrievalQueryScoreValid.description: Valid RetrievalQuery result. Score is 1.0 on pass, 0.0 on fail.

matched_queries.description: queryString values that matched the configured selector

includes_missing.description: Required terms (from `includes`) that were not present in any matched queryString

excludes_found.description: Forbidden terms (from `excludes`) that were present in a matched queryString

RetrievalResultScore.description: RetrievalResult evaluator result — valid result OR errored-evaluator record.

RetrievalResultScoreValid.description: Valid RetrievalResult result. Score is the proportion of expected_items matched (0.0–1.0).

score.description: Proportion of expected_items matched (1.0 on full pass)

threshold.description: Always 1.0 for this evaluator (all configured checks must pass)

results_evaluated.description: Number of candidate retrieval hits within max_rank that were evaluated

matched_items.description: Expected items whose retrievalExtract_contains text was found in a candidate hit

missing_items.description: Expected items whose text was not found (canonical 'did not pass' list)

extract_failures.description: Subset of missing_items where the capability returned hits but none contained the expected text

RetrievalMatchedItem.description: One matched item from a RetrievalResult run.

extractMatch.description: The configured retrievalExtract_contains text that the LLM judge found supported by the retrieved evidence

matchedHitUrl.description: webUrl of the retrieval hit that satisfied the assertion.

matchedHitRank.description: Rank of the first (best-ranked) hit whose evidence supported the claim. Lower is more relevant; always within the configured max_rank.

reason.description: The LLM judge's one-sentence rationale for the supported verdict

RetrievalMissingItem.description: One missing item from a RetrievalResult run.

extractMatch.description: The configured retrievalExtract_contains text that the LLM judge found not supported by the retrieved evidence

reason.description: The LLM judge's one-sentence rationale for the not-supported verdict

ErroredScore.description: Per-evaluator entry for an evaluator that did not produce a result.

error.description: Error message describing why the evaluator did not produce a result.

ErrorObject.description: Structured turn/item-level error with a machine-readable code and a human-readable message.

message.description: Human-readable message paired with the code.

EvaluatorMap.description: Map of evaluator names to their configuration options. Built-in evaluator keys (e.g. 'Relevance') have typed option schemas; any other valid identifier is treated as a user-authored custom evaluator (resolved at runtime from <project_root>/custom-evaluators/<name>/) and validated against CustomEvaluatorOptions. A custom evaluator is an LLM-judge when its folder contains <name>.prompty, or a code-only (non-LLM) check when it contains only <name>.py.

CustomEvaluatorOptions.description: Options for user-authored custom evaluators (both LLM-judge and code-only / non-LLM kinds). The `options` dict is forwarded to the wrapper's __init__ for evaluator-specific configuration.

threshold.description: Pass/fail threshold. A result passes when score >= threshold. Set it to match whatever scale your evaluator's score uses. For LLM-judge evaluators keep it on the 1-5 scale by convention (default: 3). For code-only evaluators it defaults to 1, which suits a 0/1 (fail/pass) score encoding; for a fractional score (e.g. a partial-match ratio in [0, 1]) use a fractional threshold such as 0.7.

options.description: Evaluator-specific configuration forwarded to the wrapper's __init__ (open schema).

LlmEvaluatorOptions.description: Options for LLM-based evaluators (Relevance, Coherence, Groundedness, Similarity). Use empty object {} for defaults.

threshold.description: Pass/fail threshold on the 1-5 LLM scale (default: 3).

citation_format.description: Citation format for detection. Default: oai_unicode.

threshold.description: Minimum partial-match score required for pass (default: 0.5).

RetrievalQueryOptions.description: Options for the RetrievalQuery evaluator. `threshold` is pinned by contract and not configurable.

capability.description: Scopes evaluation to retrieval executions with this CapabilityExecution.name (e.g., 'OneDriveAndSharePoint', 'Email', 'TeamsMessages', 'Meetings', 'People', 'GraphConnectors').

selector.description: Case-insensitive substring matched against queryString. filterExpression is excluded from selector matching in V1.

includes.description: Substrings that MUST all appear in the matched queryString.

excludes.description: Substrings that MUST NOT appear in the matched queryString.

RetrievalResultOptions.description: Options for the RetrievalResult evaluator. `capability` is required, and at least one of `expected_items` or `min_expected_count` must be set. `threshold` is pinned by contract and not configurable.

capability.description: Scopes evaluation to retrieval executions with this CapabilityExecution.name.

max_rank.description: Only evaluate hits within this rank (default 10).

min_expected_count.description: Minimum number of results required within max_rank for the scoped capability. Must be >= 1; omit the field entirely if no count assertion is desired.

expected_items.description: Extract-content assertions. URL-based matching is not supported in V1.

RetrievalExpectedItem.description: A single expected item for RetrievalResult. V1 strict: webUrl is rejected — use a distinctive phrase from the expected resource's content as retrievalExtract_contains instead.

retrievalExtract_contains.description: A claim that an LLM judge must find supported by the retrieved evidence (the content extracts within the scoped capability and max_rank).
